task_description: Build the Kiro Hub MVP - a modern, community-driven educational platform for developers to learn and adopt Kiro. Implements 7 pages (Home, About, Features, How It Works, Tutorials, Community, Resources) with shared navigation, dark/light theme, animations, accessibility, SEO, and AI placeholder UI.

verification.summary: bun run build succeeds. All 10 routes generated: / (Home), /about, /community, /features, /how-it-works, /resources, /tutorials, /robots.txt, /sitemap.xml, /_not-found. All are prerendered as static content. No TypeScript errors.
